Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled in Top Grade Tutorials.

Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher at the institution.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records a payment made by a student.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Records an expense made by the institution.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Records student attendance for a specific date.

QuestionPaper.title: QuestionPaper
QuestionPaper.description: Stores details about a generated question paper.

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description: Defines the role of a user in the system.

permissions.description: Granular access control for different app sections.

UserRoleMarker.title: User Role Marker
UserRoleMarker.description: A marker document to indicate existence of a role, typically admin.

InstitutionSettings.title: InstitutionSettings
InstitutionSettings.description: Stores global settings for the institution.

students.description: Contains records of all enrolled students.

question_papers.description: Stores details of AI-generated question papers.

user_roles.description: Stores the role for each user.

user_roles_by_role.description: Helper collection to check for admin existence without scanning. Contains documents with IDs matching role names, e.g., 'admin'.

institution_settings.description: Stores global institution settings as a singleton document.
